retry_reason: The function internally loops until it successfully acquires the cluster block group with appropriate locks; if the cluster changes during the process, it retries automatically. No external retry is required.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to lock a free space cluster and acquire a reference and possibly a read lock on the associated block group, with refcount operations being only a part of the complex synchronization logic. Significant non-refcount code includes spinlock handling, pointer comparisons, rwsem acquisition, and looping.
